summary: Joel Spolsky announces the arrival of Mike Gunderloy's new book 'Painless Project Management with FogBugz' at the Fog Creek office. He notes that FogBugz 4.0, which the book covers, will be available for sale by March 1st. Fog Creek plans to sell the book through their online store, marking their first physical inventory item.
key_points: Mike Gunderloy's book 'Painless Project Management with FogBugz' covers FogBugz 4.0 in detail
FogBugz 4.0 was not yet available for sale but expected by March 1st
Selling the book would be Fog Creek's first physical inventory item, requiring changes to their online store
money_quotes: Astute readers will note that FogBugz 4.0 is not quite available for sale yet, but it will be, by March 1st.
key_insight: This is a brief product announcement about a companion book for FogBugz 4.0 and Fog Creek's first foray into selling physical goods.
